domain: Aztec chinampa floating garden (rectangular reed-fenced mud plots in shallow lake with continuous canal-muck nutrient supply; plot soil is private but canal nutrients are shared)
specific_mechanism: Plot array with private soil + shared canal nutrient cycle; periodic dredging from canal feeds each plot.
llm_application: CSCIPA: multi-task LLM context array with private per-task buffers (plots) + shared system-wide canal context; periodic dredging extracts insights from canal into each plot; each plot dumps outputs back to canal for decomposition into reusable nutrients.
novelty_claim: SCoL (2605.07076), InCA (2412.15563), Memini (2605.05097) cover continual context updating. None retrieve plot-array + shared canal nutrient cycle + periodic dredging combo.
